title: Signal From Kharon-9 - Tri-band Drift Lock Puzzle Board
prompt: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Puzzle visual for "Tri-band Drift Lock". Objective: Align three phase drifts shared across players to stabilize decryption.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
